requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs Americas J1772 / CCS1 Ecosystem
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与美洲J1772 / CCS1体系
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與美洲J1772 / CCS1體系

summary.en: Honduras does not appear to have a clearly published official EVSE connector mandate from CREE or ENEE as of 2026-06-14. Given the country's 120/240 V 60 Hz Americas electrical environment and regional vehicle imports, the likely practical connector ecosystem is SAE J1772 Type 1 for AC charging and CCS Combo 1 for DC fast charging, with any NACS, CHAdeMO, or multi-standard outlet requirement depending on vehicle fleet and project owner. Exporters should confirm the required connector with CREE, ENEE, the importer, and the charge-point operator before quotation or shipment.
summary.zh: 截至2026年6月14日，未发现CREE或ENEE发布清晰的官方EVSE接口强制规定。基于洪都拉斯120/240 V、60 Hz的美洲电气环境及区域车辆进口结构，实务上较可能采用SAE J1772 Type 1交流充电和CCS Combo 1直流快充；是否需要NACS、CHAdeMO或多标准接口取决于车辆车队和项目业主。出口商在报价或出货前应向CREE、ENEE、进口商和充电点运营商确认所需接口。
summary.zht: 截至2026年6月14日，未發現CREE或ENEE發布清晰的官方EVSE接口強制規定。基於宏都拉斯120/240 V、60 Hz的美洲電氣環境及區域車輛進口結構，實務上較可能採用SAE J1772 Type 1交流充電和CCS Combo 1直流快充；是否需要NACS、CHAdeMO或多標準接口取決於車輛車隊和項目業主。出口商在報價或出貨前應向CREE、ENEE、進口商和充電點運營商確認所需接口。

standards_or_laws: SAE J1772 — AC conductive charging connector used in Americas markets
IEC 62196-3 configuration EE / CCS Combo 1 — DC fast-charging connector family
IEC 61851-1 — conductive EV supply equipment general requirements
CREE / ENEE project or tender requirements to be confirmed

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and China DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers with GB/T 27930 communication. GB/T AC and DC connector geometry, pinout, proximity/control signaling, locking, and DC communication are not physically or electrically compatible with SAE J1772 or CCS1 vehicles.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，中国直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器并使用GB/T 27930通信。GB/T交流和直流接口在几何形状、针脚、接近/控制导引信号、锁止及直流通信方面均与SAE J1772或CCS1车辆不具备物理或电气兼容性。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，中國直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器並使用GB/T 27930通訊。GB/T交流和直流接口在幾何形狀、針腳、接近/控制導引信號、鎖止及直流通訊方面均與SAE J1772或CCS1車輛不具備物理或電氣兼容性。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — DC charger to BMS communication
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — conductive charging system general requirements

gap.en: A China GB/T-only charger needs hardware redesign for the locally used connector. For likely Honduras deployments this means J1772 cable/inlet interoperability for AC and CCS1 coupler, locking, PLC or project-required DC communication, temperature-rise evidence, labels, spare parts, and service procedures for DC. Do not assume Type 2 / CCS2 or GB/T acceptance; confirm with CREE / ENEE and the project owner.
gap.zh: 仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩需要针对当地使用接口进行硬件重新设计。对洪都拉斯较可能的部署而言，这意味着交流侧需满足J1772线缆/车辆接口互操作，直流侧需改为CCS1耦合器、锁止、PLC或项目要求的直流通信、温升证据、标签、备件和服务流程。不得假定Type 2 / CCS2或GB/T会被接受；应向CREE / ENEE和项目业主确认。
gap.zht: 僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁需要針對當地使用接口進行硬體重新設計。對宏都拉斯較可能的部署而言，這意味著交流側需滿足J1772線纜/車輛接口互操作，直流側需改為CCS1耦合器、鎖止、PLC或項目要求的直流通訊、溫升證據、標籤、備件和服務流程。不得假定Type 2 / CCS2或GB/T會被接受；應向CREE / ENEE和項目業主確認。

mandatory_status.target: Project-critical — official national EVSE connector mandate not confirmed; connector becomes mandatory when required by importer, CPO, fleet, tender, site owner, CREE, or ENEE; GB/T physical incompatibility makes direct substitution impossible
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not a J1772 / CCS1 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat connector choice as a field-confirmed Honduras project requirement. GB/T connector chargers need hardware change to the locally used connector, likely J1772 / CCS1 in the Americas ecosystem, and this must be confirmed with CREE / ENEE before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将接口选择视为需现场确认的洪都拉斯项目要求。GB/T接口充电桩需要硬件改为当地使用接口，在美洲体系下很可能为J1772 / CCS1，并且须在出货前向CREE / ENEE确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將接口選擇視為需現場確認的宏都拉斯項目要求。GB/T接口充電樁需要硬體改為當地使用接口，在美洲體系下很可能為J1772 / CCS1，並且須在出貨前向CREE / ENEE確認。
